---
title: "Media"
toc: true
---

A collection of media, presentations, and achievements.

## Presentations & Slides

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/Logo.png){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Presentation Title Here**

A brief description of the presentation — topic, context, and date.

[More →](Images/Logo.png){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/Logo.png){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Presentation Title Here**

A brief description of the presentation — topic, context, and date.

[More →](Images/Logo.png){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::::

## Certificates & Achievements

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/Logo.png){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Certificate Name — Issuing Organisation, Year**

Brief description of what you achieved or learned.

[More →](Images/Logo.png){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images/Logo.png){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}

**Certificate Name — Issuing Organisation, Year**

Brief description of what you achieved or learned.

[More →](Images/Logo.png){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
:::

::::

## Videos

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
<iframe width="100%" height="200" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dvgZkm1xWPE?list=RDdvgZkm1xWPE"  frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Video Title Here**

Brief description of the video.
:::
:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
<iframe width="100%" height="200" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dvgZkm1xWPE?list=RDdvgZkm1xWPE"  frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Video Title Here**

Brief description of the video.
:::
:::

::::
